nodes.label: YAPAMADIKLARIM - Unresolved Bugs and TODOs
nodes.rationale: Documents 6 complex UI/UX bugs in dashboard.js that could not be fully resolved: (1) autocomplete closure state isolation preventing new leads from appearing without page reload, (2) physio pricing calculation not persisting due to cache or sector check failures, (3) bkEnd auto-calculation via service duration with residual references causing silent nulls, (4) anamnese PDF print outputting wrong content (cache likely), (5) physio duration picker integration in booking modal, (6) Hausbesuch icon placement in small booking blocks. Root causes involve JS closure scoping, browser caching, and DOM element reference management.

nodes.label: Bug: Booking Modal - New Lead Not Auto-Selected After Save
nodes.rationale: Root cause: allLeads array lives in a closure inside initBkCustomerAutocomplete(), so after a new lead is saved, the closure's stale array doesn't include the new entry. Fix: lift allLeads to window/module scope (window.allLeadsBk), make loadLeads() externally callable, and call selectLead(newId) after push.

nodes.label: Bug: Physio 5-Min Einheitspreis Auto-Calculation Not Working
nodes.rationale: Likely causes: browser cache serving stale dashboard.js, getSector() returning wrong value, or srvPhysioFields still hidden. Debug via network tab + console.log + window.calculatePhysioPrices() test.

nodes.label: Bug: Booking Modal - Auto End Time (bkEnd Removal Residuals)
nodes.rationale: bkEnd input was removed from HTML but references remain scattered in dashboard.js (openBookingModal, prefillBookingModal, _bkModalState, bkMoveBtn). Silent null returns where bkEnd would have been used need full audit.

nodes.label: Bug: Anamnese PDF Print Shows Wrong Content
nodes.rationale: printAnamnese() function added and onclick updated to reference it, but user still sees old behavior. Browser cache is primary suspect. Verify via network tab that new dashboard.js version is loaded.

nodes.label: Bug/Feature: Physio Service Duration Picker in Booking Modal
Bug: Hausbesuch Icon Position in Booking Block
nodes.rationale: Icon overlaps text in small booking blocks (e.g. 15-min appointments). overflow:hidden clips the icon. Solution: hide icon below threshold height, or use border-left color coding instead.
